title: The Valley of Death
original_title: Winnetou und Shatterhand im Tal der Toten
overview: An army gold shipment and its escort vanish in the Ozarks, prompting accusations of theft and desertion but frontiersman Old Shatterhand and Apache chief Winnetou help solve the mystery of the missing army gold.
